feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public Cloud: Functionality for comparing customizing settings between systems
entry.content:
We are trying to determine if we have a similar app in the Public Cloud to the one we previously had in ECC (SCU0) for comparing customizing settings between systems (Dev, Test, Prod)

(Fiori Library we checked)

Thank you!

entry.title: create the custom header text at purchase requisition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is it possible to create the custom header text at purchase requisition in sap s/4 hana public cloud?

I can't find the ''define text type for header text".

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement 

Best Regards,

Khaing.

entry.title: Table function in Public Cloud using standard Table
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a table function on the public cloud. In the class, I can't use VBRK, so I'm using I_BillingDocumentBasic. But it's showing an error like this.

"I_BILLINGDOCUMENTBASIC" is client-specific and restricts access to a single client. The calling AMDP method "GET_DATA" must also allow this restriction."

How to fix this error?

Can anyone answer this?

 

Thanks,

Naveen

entry.title: Spaces and Pages Export
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

I would like to know how to export or download the Spaces and Pages information in S/4HC. 

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request for CDS view to deduce the FAUF number from the PMR number
entry.content:
Due to our physical production conditions, our process provides for the implementation of an SST between SAP DM and S4H WM. This should first scan an HU, which is provided to the machine fully automatically on an order-related basis, and then read the material number and batch from SAP DM using the Get Retrieve HU API.
Furthermore, we must ensure on the process side that a provided KLT is actually consumed on the corresponding production order (FAUF), as there is no longer any manual intervention. 

SAP DM requires the FAUF so that it can post the consumption. The PMR number is obtained from the WM via the Get Physical Stock API. Our question is:

How can we deduce the FAUF number from the PMR number?
Is there a CDS view or an API that can be used for this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set filter when consuming the Custom CDS view based API in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
After publishing custom APIs through custom CDS views and using external tools to obtain information, the query criteria do not work and cannot be filtered by individual fields like standard APIs; 
 
Do you have any solutions?

通过自定义CDS视图发布的自定义API后，利用外部工具获取信息，查询条件不起作用，不能像标准API那样按照个别字段筛选；

请问有什么解决方案吗？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integration SAP Public Cloud and SAP Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

we have integrated the SAP Public Cloud with the SAP Sales Cloud V2.
Is there anyone in the community who has already done this and with who we can exchange experiences?

For example, we have problems with the e-mail address of the contact person. When we enter it in Public Cloud, we can't find it in Sales Cloud V2 and vice versa.

Thanks in advance!

Katharina

entry.title: Not able to update the values in S4Hana public with PUT method
entry.content:
Dear community,

 

I tried to update the value in a purchase order with the PUT method using Postman. The response was 200 OK, but the value was not updated.

I also tried the same thing using the Try Out feature on Business Accelerator Hub, and I successfully updated the value.

Here is the setting that I used on Postman:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

・Method：PUT

・URL：https://my4*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder/0 

・Authentication：Basic Authentication

・Header：

　・x-csrf-token＆cookie：the value that I fetched by executing GET method with the header "x-csrf-token：Fetch"

・Body（Raw, Json）：

　

{"YY1_processedFlg_PDH":false}

* "YY1_processedFlg_PDH"：Custom field

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I would really appreciate any advice on this issue!

Please give me a comment if there is anything unclear for you to figure the problem out.

 

Thank you.

Regards,

entry.title: Different number ranges for sales document type and billing document type.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In public cloud, We create sales order with (OR) Order type, as there is a requirement from customer for multiple sales order type copying OR order type which is not possible in public cloud system. so we have created one custom field Order sub type in that we have maintained multiple sales document type, so the user can select the Sub Order Type as required and can create a sales order, now the requirement is we want different number ranges for Order sub type and same should work for billing document.

Please suggest how can we achieve this scenario.

entry.title: Exploring Custom Business Objects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL
entry.content:
Hello everyone! This is my first blog post, and I'm excited to share my journey exploring SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL. Recently, I had the opportunity to work with Custom Business Objects (CBOs) in the Customizing Tenant. In this post, I'll walk you through the process of creating entries using the ODATA API of a Custom Business Object within the system.

Creating Custom Business Objects

In our project, we started by creating Custom Business Objects in the Customizing Tenant. This process automatically generated a user interface (UI) that allowed us to create entries directly. Here's a quick overview of the steps:

  1. Navigate to the Customizing Tenant: Access the SAP Fiori launchpad and go to the Custom Business Objects app.
  2. Create a New Custom Business Object: Define the object with the necessary fields and attributes.
  3. Generate the UI: Once the object is created, the system generates a UI for data entry. (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-extensibility-cbo-create..html)

Using the ODATA API

Our next task was to create entries using the ODATA API of the Custom Business Object. This required a few prerequisites:

  1. Create a Custom Communication Service: Ensure you have set up a communication service for your Custom Business Object. (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-business-object..html)
  2. Access the Development Tenant: Log in to the Development Tenant and open Eclipse ADT.

Creating a Class in Eclipse ADT

To interact with the ODATA API, we created a class in Eclipse ADT. Here are the steps:

  1. Open Eclipse ADT: Launch Eclipse and log in to your Development Tenant.
  2. Create a New ABAP Class: Use the following template in your class:

We have created a structure with Code & Reason. To know the HTTP Response for our action.(EX : 201 Created, 400 BADRequest..)

We are getting to the implementation part.

LV_URL will have the ODATA Url which you would have got from the Communication Service of your CBO 

From lv_user_id to lv_last_name are the declaration of values which will be used in the payload.

We use cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url to create an HTTP destination, which represents the connection to the OData service.

  • HTTP Client: An HTTP client is created using cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination.
  • Authorization: Basic authorization is set using set_authorization_basic.
  • Headers: Headers for content type, accept, and CSRF token are set.
  • CSRF Token: The CSRF token is fetched and set in the request header.

The Final Part,

  • Payload: A payload is created with user details and set in the request.
  • POST Request: A POST request is executed to create entries in the Custom Business Object.
  • Response Handling: The response status and reason are captured.

I am creating 3 entries by iteration, so i have used DO statement in it.

To check the result, you can check the CBO Application.

Conclusion

Working with Custom Business Objects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL has been an enriching experience. The ability to create and manage custom objects, coupled with the power of ODATA APIs, opens up numerous possibilities for customization and integration.

I hope this post helps you get started with Custom Business Objects and ODATA APIs in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL. Stay tuned for more insights and tutorials. Cloud Operations SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ABAP Extensibility SAP Community

entry.content:

best regards

Srivalli

entry.title: CDS View for Invoice Related Dispute
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are  trying to get a CDS view to extract data in Datasphere on Invoice Related Dispute.
We are not able to find one Release version of CDS View which we can use to create Custom CDS View and pull it in Datasphere.
There is another View in View Browser as R_DisputeCaseLinkedInvoice , which seems to work for us but it is not released.

Please suggest one such view or resolution for us.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:

entry.title: Joule in SAC and S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello. I want to ask, did anyone know is joule already available at SAP Analytics Cloud ? If yes is there any guide how to connect it?

 

Also for joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition , can joule show a bar chart or line chart ? Cause when i try its cannot

entry.title: Project Sap Public Cloud
entry.content: I want a sample project (task schedule) for sap public cloud

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_CUST201 When posting in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app,
entry.content:
We are currently testing the operation in a starter environment.
When I post in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app, I get the following error:
I checked the Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes.
At 0L, accounting principles were assigned to company codes.

Which configuration activities should I check?
Also, I would like to know if there are any notes that are useful for setting.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Correct the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal
Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST201

Diagnosis
There are inconsistencies in the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal.

System Response
To prevent database mismatches, postings are not allowed as long as the customizing settings are not consistent.

Procedure
Check the Customizing settings using transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK.

If this message was displayed during a posting activity, use transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK_P to check the specific Customizing settings for the relevant company codes and ledgers.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: How to Represent Supplier Discount as an Isolated Item in Purchase Order (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to represent a supplier discount as an isolated item with a negative price in a purchase order. However, based on the information I've gathered, it seems that creating an item with a negative price is not supported in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

As an alternative, I used the condition type to represent the discount. However, this leads to the following challenges:

  1. The discount is distributed across all PO items, but our customer requires that the discount not affect the material prices.

  2. The discount is no longer displayed as a separate line item in the PO, since it is split among the items.

Is there a workaround or best practice to show the total discount amount separately—perhaps at the end of the PO output? Would using the Livecycle help achieve this?

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Unable to post asset retirement with customer – system requires a cost object for revenue GL account
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, focusing solely on the Finance (FI) module. As part of our asset accounting process, we are trying to post a fixed asset retirement integrated with a customer using the standard “Asset Retirement with Customer (Integrated)” app. During this process, we select the relevant customer and fixed asset, and assign a revenue G/L account for the transaction. Additionally, we enter the profit center as required by the client for reporting purposes.

However, upon simulation or posting, the system throws error KI248 stating:
"Account xxxxxxxx requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting."
The error indicates that the profit center assignment is considered only statistical and therefore not sufficient for revenue postings to this G/L account, which is defined as a Primary Cost or Revenue account with Cost Element Category 11 (Revenue).

Our client is not implementing or Profitability Analysis (CO-PA), and we do not have any real CO objects such as internal orders, WBS elements, or sales orders configured or available in scope. The requirement is simple: to record revenue against profit centers so financial statements can be generated by profit center dimension. We do not want to (and should not need to) maintain real CO objects, as they are not part of the project scope.

Despite entering a profit center, the system requires a true cost accounting object due to the nature of the cost element category. Since we are not implementing CO-PA, this requirement is currently blocking a valid business process in SAP Public Cloud. The error seems to enforce controlling behavior, even when controlling is not part of the activated scope in the cloud tenant.

Therefore, we request SAP Support to advise on how this can be resolved. Ideally, we would like to continue using a revenue G/L account (to reflect revenue properly in the P&L) and post to it with only a profit center, without the need for any additional CO-relevant object. If there is a configuration workaround, scope item adjustment, or recommendation for using a different G/L setup for such scenarios in SAP Public Cloud, please advise accordingly.

entry.title: Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP)：Create consumption data question
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask: for a customer who has newly implemented SAP and wants to use the DDRMRP , is it possible to directly maintain historical daily consumption data? I tried to maintain the consumption data in the Forecasting view of the material master, but when I run the schedule production classification, the system still notifies me that there is no consumption data ,  Is it necessary to have actual delivery records before DDRMRP can be used?

 

 

 

Best regards
Lance

entry.title: BAdI to change PMP0 value of PO Item
entry.content:
I would like to know that can we change value of PMP0 value in PO Item from BAdI logic.

I write logic in BAdI  MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM and it doesn't allow to update this value.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin
